evidence.snippet: Advanced Motor Solutions for Drone/UAV/UAS Systems
*   Minimized weight, high efficacy and high torque Motors from 43mm to 148mm in diameter with rugged and reliable bearing designs based on proven Allient motors made globally

items.notes: Brushless outer rotor motors 43mm–148mm diameter explicitly marketed for UAS/UAV/drone propulsion, manufactured in the USA. Also SA series axial flux, frameless, slotless motor families.

evidence.snippet: *   Efficient and lightweight drive electronics with sensorless- and sensored-FOC manufactured in the USA, enabling longer flight times and quieter operation

items.notes: Drone capabilities page describes sensorless/sensored FOC drive electronics manufactured in USA for drone applications; ESC expansion explicitly planned as next drone product category.

evidence.snippet: Today, Allient is headquartered in Buffalo, New York, and serves customers throughout the United States, Canada, Mexico, Europe, and Asia via our Technology Units, Sales Units, and Solution Centers. Take a look at our history to see how we've grown.
### **Mission-ready propulsion and motion systems engineered for UAV, aerospace, and defense platforms with demanding performance and integration requirements.
*   Minimized weight, high efficacy and high torque Motors from 43mm to 148mm in diameter with rugged and reliable bearing designs based on proven Allient motors made globally

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures motors and drive electronics sold as components to drone OEMs and system builders. Does not build complete UAS platforms.

products.notes: Many additional motor series in catalog (Quantum, PerformeX, Megaflux, Electroflux, LS, TG). Core drone-relevant products are the outer-rotor UAS motors and drive electronics.

ndaa.notes: Site claims 'Made in the USA' and 'Designed, built, and supported in the USA' for drone products, but no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: Allient produces over 5 million motors every year delivering proven expertise and unmatched reliability.

readiness.notes: 5 million motors produced annually; catalog products with datasheets, specifications, and available firmware. Design/customization services offered as secondary mode.

unresolved_questions: NDAA 848/889 compliance status not explicitly disclosed despite 'Made in USA' claim
Blue UAS cleared list status unknown
ESC product availability timeline for drone market not specified (described as planned expansion)

tagline: Frameless and housed brushless motors, servo drives, and linear motors for drone propulsion, gimbals, and precision motion control. US-based production. NDAA compliance status and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed; limited independent validation of drone-motor performance specs in open literature.
